svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.5.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.1"> <diagram id="service-catalog-arch" name="Service Catalog Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="-704" dy="-200" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" background="#FFFFFF" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="Service Catalog Server アーキテクチャ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="600" x="400" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;rounded=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Client Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="600" x="30" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=10;" value="React SPA
(Service Catalog UI)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="20" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=10;" value="CLI
(Rust dialoguer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="220" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=10;" value="External API Client
(REST/gRPC)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="420" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="API Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="200" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;" target="20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;rounded=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Service Catalog Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="900" x="30" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="REST Handlers
(axum)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="20" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="gRPC Service
(tonic)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="170" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="43" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Auth + RBAC
Middleware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="130" x="320" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="44" parent="40" style="swimlane;startSize=20;rounded=1;fillColor=#FFF9E6;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Use Cases" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="580" x="20" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="45" parent="44" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=9;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="ListServices / GetService / RegisterService / UpdateService / DeleteService
ManageDependencies / HealthStatus / ManageDocs / GetScorecard / SearchServices" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="10" y="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="46" parent="40" style="swimlane;startSize=20;rounded=1;fillColor=#FFF9E6;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Domain" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="580" x="20" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="47" parent="46" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=9;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="Service | Team | Dependency | HealthStatus | Scorecard | Claims
ServiceRepository | TeamRepository | DependencyRepository | HealthRepository | DocRepository | ScorecardRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="560" x="10" y="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Kafka Publisher" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="630" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="51" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Redis Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="630" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="52" parent="40" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontSize=10;" value="Health Collector
(Background)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="630" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82B366;" target="40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="PostgreSQL
(service_catalog)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="990" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="71" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="Redis
(Cache)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="990" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="72" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="Kafka
(Events)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="990" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="80" edge="1" parent="1" source="40" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="70"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="81" edge="1" parent="1" source="51" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="71"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="82" edge="1" parent="1" source="50" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="72"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="90" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="External Services
(/healthz endpoints)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="1150" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="91" edge="1" parent="1" source="52" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#9673A6;dashed=1;" target="90" value="polling"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
